2026-03-20T12:19:23.6149055Z     echo "Backend tests failed"
2026-03-20T12:19:23.6150012Z     exit 1
2026-03-20T12:19:23.6150843Z   fi

2026-03-20T12:19:23.6154066Z     exit 1
2026-03-20T12:19:23.6154840Z   fi
